steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to "specify the average length of the green iguana." One fact in the notes addresses this directly: the green iguana has an average length of 4.8 feet. The correct choice must include that figure.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'diet': describes what the iguana eats, not its length. ✗
  • Choice B — 'habitat': describes where the iguana lives, not its length. ✗
  • Choice C — 'location': describes the iguana's geographic range, not its length. ✗
  • Choice D — '4.8 feet average length': directly states the average length, fulfilling the student's stated goal. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
